message:
feat(doctor): lazy capture-driver dependency checks, artifact path zeroing for dirless runs

Lazy dependency checking:
- doctor command no longer checks capture-driver dependencies (vhs,
  docker, etc.) by default -- those checks now only run with --full
- New check_app_smoke_fallback_dependencies() extracted to check bash
  and tmux (if tmux observe mode is active) right before the smoke
  test runs, chained via .and_then() so missing deps gracefully skip
  the smoke test instead of failing eagerly at startup

Artifact path traversal hardening:
- New clear_run_scoped_artifacts_for_report() zeroes out all file-path
  fields (output, snapshot, evidence_ledger, artifact_manifest, various
  log paths) when a run has no valid run_dir, preventing the report
  from linking to files resolved relative to cwd (potential path
  traversal / information leak)
- Test confirms cwd-relative files like capture.mp4, snapshot.png, and
  evidence_ledger.jsonl are never rendered into HTML or JSON report

Integration tests updated: three tests rewritten to match new behavior
(doctor without --full succeeds even without capture tooling), one test
renamed from "requires bash" to "succeeds without bash/tmux"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
